name: Keith Ellison
subject: We want to hear your ideas
body:
We had a great time last night on Democrats Live.
---
**Liked Democrats Live? Help us keep getting our message out to voters in every state. Pitch in $3 or more now.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c499/4067b0a/2def274e4/7e7f355f/842804475/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Our-Party-Our-Future-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170309_ke_nd&source=em_20170309_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170309_ke_nd")****
Friend --

Last night, Tom and I debuted our first-ever Democrats Live from right here at DNC HQ. We had a great time! If you missed it, you can get caught up right now:

[](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c499/4067b0a/2def274e4/7e7f355c/842804475/VEsE/ "http://democrats.org/democratslive?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20170309_ke_nd&source=em_20170309_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170309_ke_nd")

Our top priority as we get to work helping the Democratic Party move forward is making sure we engage everyone in this fight. One of the ways we do that is getting creative in the ways we can get the word out -- maybe in ways we haven't even figured out yet.

There was so much great energy in that room last night, and I know there is all across the country, too. So here's what's next:

**[First, tell us what you think!](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Democrats-Live-Feedback1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+First+tell+us+what+you+think&utm_campaign=em_20170309_ke_nd&source=em_20170309_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170309_ke_nd")** We want to hear your ideas, your questions, who you want to see as a guest on Democrats Live in upcoming weeks -- anything that you think we can do better or start doing.

Then, spread the word. We got this show up and running faster than we expected, so we want to make sure people know we're here and it's just going to get better each week.

And if you can, pitch in $3 or more right now so our party has the resources to do more things like this to reach voters where they live and help Democrats fight back and win in 2017 and beyond.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c499/4067b0a/2def274e4/7e7f355a/842804475/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170309_ke_nd&source=em_20170309_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170309_ke_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c499/4067b0a/2def274e4/7e7f355b/842804475/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170309_ke_nd&source=em_20170309_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170309_ke_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c499/4067b0a/2def274e4/7e7f3558/842804475/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170309_ke_nd&source=em_20170309_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170309_ke_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c499/4067b0a/2def274e4/7e7f3559/842804475/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170309_ke_nd&source=em_20170309_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170309_ke_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c499/4067b0a/2def274e4/7e7f3566/842804475/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170309_ke_nd&source=em_20170309_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170309_ke_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c499/4067b0a/2def274e4/7e7f3567/842804475/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/Our-Party-Our-Future-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170309_ke_nd&source=em_20170309_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170309_ke_nd")
** Thanks for all you do -- and watch your inbox! We'll be announcing our special guest for the next episode of Democrats Live real soon.

Keith

Keith Ellison
Deputy Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c499/4067b0a/2def274e4/7e7f3564/842804475/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170309_ke_nd&source=em_20170309_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170309_ke_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c499/4067b0a/2def274e4/7e7f3565/842804475/VEsHBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170309_ke_nd&source=em_20170309_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170309_ke_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c499/4067b0a/2def274e4/7e7f3562/842804475/VEsHBw/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170309_ke_nd&source=em_20170309_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170309_ke_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c499/4067b0a/2def274e4/7e7f3563/842804475/VEsHBg/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170309_ke_nd&source=em_20170309_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170309_ke_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: SURVEY@fladems.com
subject: Legislative Session (What do you think?!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
| | **2017 Legislative Session**
Florida Democratic Supporter Survey

Did you see the survey that the team sent you earlier this week?

With the 2017 Florida Legislative Session going on at a full-swing, Florida Democrats are standing up for our rights and our shared values.

But, we need to know what our best supporters like you think about the GOP agenda.

[**Can you click here to take our survey?**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b22c/1a5213b3/76dea903/718baf9b/3452152141/VEsE/p/eyJKU1Z6YjNWeVkyVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWbWFYSnpkRzVoYldVbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZzWVhOMGJtRnRaU1VsIjoiIiwiSlNWbGJXRnBiQ1VsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJKU1Y2YVhBbEpRPT0iOiIzNDIyMyIsIkpTVklUMDFGVUVoUFRrVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/2017-florida-democrats-legislative-survey?source=&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&phone=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+click+here+to+take+our+survey&utm_campaign=em030917&refcode=em030917")

name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: [Help needed] Thousands of women are ready to run >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7cf6/24c69fd9/f40e6a08/18e0a038/4274394479/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE308N_digital_email_20170308_RuntoWin_n-all&source=WQEFE308N_digital_email_20170308_RuntoWin_n-all")
---

Peter,

When we launched our national recruitment campaign, Run to Win, we knew it was going to be big. But I'll be honest, we didn't know it would be _this_ big.

Since Election Day, more than 9,500 women across all 50 states have told us they're interested in running for office for the first time. That's HUGE. It represents what could be an exponential upward shift in the number of women in government -- in short, it's a movement in the making.

Our job is to nurture this movement through trainings, support, and coaching -- and that takes resources. In fact, our first official Run to Win training is right around the corner. If we're going to support these women and help get them into office we need your help.

**[Donate $3 now to fuel thousands of pro-choice Democratic women who are ready to run and win.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7cf6/24c69fd9/f40e6a08/18e0a039/4274394479/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170308_email_RuntoWin?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+now+to+fuel+thousands+of+procho&utm_campaign=WQEFE308N_digital_email_20170308_RuntoWin_n-all&source=WQEFE308N_digital_email_20170308_RuntoWin_n-all")**

From California Senator Dianne Feinstein to Boston City Council member Ayanna Pressley, we've helped elect women across the country who are making a difference. Our candidates have pushed back on President Trump's nominees, protested the Muslim ban at airports, and fought for reproductive rights. Their work proves just how powerful pro-choice Democratic women are when they're given a platform.

We know what we do works, now it's time to expand -- massively.

More than 9,500 women are saying they're ready to run for office. It's up to us to get them what they need to make that a reality.

**Donate $3 now to help thousands of women Run to Win:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Expand-Massively](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7cf6/24c69fd9/f40e6a08/18e0a03a/4274394479/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170308_email_RuntoWin?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgExpandMassively&utm_campaign=WQEFE308N_digital_email_20170308_RuntoWin_n-all&source=WQEFE308N_digital_email_20170308_RuntoWin_n-all")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

****[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7cf6/24c69fd9/f40e6a08/18e0a03b/4274394479/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170308_email_RuntoWin?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFE308N_digital_email_20170308_RuntoWin_n-all&source=WQEFE308N_digital_email_20170308_RuntoWin_n-all")****

****
|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7cf6/24c69fd9/f40e6a08/18e0a034/4274394479/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFE308N_digital_email_20170308_RuntoWin_n-all&source=WQEFE308N_digital_email_20170308_RuntoWin_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7cf6/24c69fd9/f40e6a08/18e0a035/4274394479/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE308N_digital_email_20170308_RuntoWin_n-all&source=WQEFE308N_digital_email_20170308_RuntoWin_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7cf6/24c69fd9/f40e6a08/18e0a036/4274394479/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE308N_digital_email_20170308_RuntoWin_n-all&source=WQEFE308N_digital_email_20170308_RuntoWin_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: The White House
subject: President Trump's Weekly Address
body:
Recap of Week 7. |

President Donald J. Trump continued building momentum this week toward fulfilling one of the most important promises he made to the American people: the repeal and replacement of Obamacare. After seven long years of disaster, President Trump and Republicans in Congress have begun the process of fixing America’s broken healthcare system and giving the power back to the American people.

Tomorrow morning at 11 a.m., the President will deliver an important message regarding the future of healthcare in America during his Weekly Address to the Nation. **Follow[President Donald J. Trump](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=de1b27ab4dcf5ad2fb7f3fe5f8735157bbb022a8c4a3f46e377e2ff5514ce9e0e0f504a0ac907588891ebea55037a1f8ce52c6d0ffd72ed9) and [the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=de1b27ab4dcf5ad282b479d9b7f02b162495f38c16243c34b53e91f96619862ca371de4f560177c45d508693cace0ab352311636cbb36ee5) on Facebook [to make sure you don't miss this important message!](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=de1b27ab4dcf5ad2331374e04e7bec74711ee347535f4cbf6c14fc0f52fa87233247f8632f1ad91a6771d4f747a1de64d94fc4977b35e60f)**

Thank you for your continued support.

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=de1b27ab4dcf5ad23ecf7e7a8efea3917157c22eda694722f8333467620a1ef6db77872b4dcc5745a23224ef8cf3b3721541ccb51b5874a8) [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=de1b27ab4dcf5ad242fb5d5cb3e42861a9118df4368243250fd34b41e734a52b5ac19c72d8920820accd38d3b8245fcc75de49c5cd2cf6ae)[Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4abca9df810378632dfe972dbf79562c7f3ac017cb4918448c5d739c81ca1d5a56565bd2fb434cb4abc1ecef423c4c870)

name: signature-needed@dscc.org
subject: Quick update for you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Criticism continues to mount after Republicans introduced their plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act. Join us to get your opposition on the record: Criticism continues to mount after Republicans introduced their plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act. Join us to get your opposition on the record:
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e383/2b07114c/5b76bfa4/736b8953/936708849/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trumpcare?source=DPE-20170309-Signature_DS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")
Friend --

It's been just a few days since Republicans introduced their plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and the criticism continues to mount.

The American Medical Association said this in opposition, "As drafted, [this legislation] would result in millions of Americans losing coverage and benefits."

Here was the statement from AARP: "[We oppose] this legislation, as introduced, that would weaken Medicare, leaving the door open to a voucher program that shifts costs and risks to seniors."

And the American Hospital Association: "We cannot support the American Health Care Act in its current form."

And the American College of Physicians: "The AHCA will have a tremendously negative impact on access, quality, and cost of care compared to current law for patients."

**[Get your opposition on the record, too. Sign on to oppose Trumpcare.](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e383/2b07114c/5b76bfa4/736b8953/936708849/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trumpcare?source=DPE-20170309-Signature_DS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")**

Despite near-universal opposition from health care experts, patient advocates, and millions of people like you, Republicans are racing forward to pass this bill. They'll start voting in a matter of days.

And here's the thing.

The White House believes they have the support they need for this bill to pass. Just yesterday, Kellyanne Conway told Fox News, "President Trump is very confident about the passage of the American Health Care Act for many reasons."

**We need to speak out now, while undecided Republicans are still deciding how they 'll vote. **

Add your name:

**[http://dscc.org/fight-aca-repeal](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e383/2b07114c/5b76bfa4/736b8953/936708849/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trumpcare?source=DPE-20170309-Signature_DS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")**

Thank you,
Team DSCC

**A quick note on contributions, friend:**

The fight ahead on health care is going to be a tough one. Already, the GOP is targeting multiple Senate Democrats with aggressive ad campaigns to support this sham of a health care replacement. 99% of our contributions come from donors giving $200 or less, so when we say we're depending on grassroots donors, we mean it. We don't have the Koch brothers in our corner, but we do have you. We hope you'll pitch today to help Senate Democrats in the fights ahead.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-20170309-Signature_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=200,150,75,50,25&amount=1&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e383/2b07114c/5b76bfa4/736b894d/936708849/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e383/2b07114c/5b76bfa4/736b894c/936708849/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e383/2b07114c/5b76bfa4/736b894f/936708849/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

Join us to get your opposition on the record: Criticism continues to mount after Republicans introduced their plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act. Join us to get your opposition on the record: "=" Friend -- It's been just a few days since Republicans introduced their plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and the criticism continues to mount. The American Medical Association said this in opposition, "As drafted, [this legislation] would result in millions of Americans losing coverage and benefits." Here was the statement from AARP: "[We oppose] this legislation, as introduced, that would weaken Medicare, leaving the door open to a voucher program that shifts costs and risks to seniors." And the American Hospital Association: "We cannot support the American Health Care Act in its current form." And the American College of Physicians: "The AHCA will have a tremendously negative impact on access, quality, and cost of care compared to current law for patients." "=" Despite near-universal opposition from health care experts, patient advocates, and millions of people like you, Republicans are racing forward to pass this bill. They'll start voting in a matter of days. And here's the thing. The White House believes they have the support they need for this bill to pass. Just yesterday, Kellyanne Conway told Fox News, "President Trump is very confident about the passage of the American Health Care Act for many reasons." We need to speak out now, while undecided Republicans are still deciding how they 'll vote.
